```python
def main():
    import sys
    S = sys.stdin.readline().strip()
    if not S:
        print("")
        return

    reversed_S = S[::-1]
    combined = S + '#' + reversed_S
    failure = [0] * len(combined)

    for i in range(1, len(combined)):
        j = failure[i - 1]
        while j > 0 and combined[i] != combined[j]:
            j = failure[j - 1]
        if combined[i] == combined[j]:
            j += 1
        failure[i] = j

    len_palindrome_suffix = failure[-1]
    part_to_add = S[:len(S) - len_palindrome_suffix][::-1]
    print(S + part_to_add)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```
